rationale: Qodo free-tier notice is informational and contains no actionable code feedback.
Removed the duplicate-label ambiguity by making Jira preset targets context-specific and non-preset instruction labels step-specific.
Jira preset import target labels now render as Instructions (Preset) and Instructions attachments (Preset).
Non-preset step instruction fields now use Step N Instructions while preset steps keep Instructions.
Reviewed Jira import tests now query Step 1 Instructions for step fields instead of the ambiguous Instructions label.
Preset and step assertions now use distinct accessible labels: Instructions for preset and Step 1 Instructions for step text.
